Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class ProofSaver

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.OutputStreamProofSaver
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.ProofSaver
Direct Known Subclasses:
GZipProofSaver, ProofBundleSaver
public class ProofSaver extends OutputStreamProofSaver
Saves a proof and provides useful methods for pretty printing terms or programs.

    • ProofSaver

      public ProofSaver(Proof proof, String fileName, String internalVersion)

      public ProofSaver(Proof proof, File file)

    • ProofSaver

      public ProofSaver(Proof proof, File file, String internalVersion)

    • ProofSaver

      public ProofSaver(Proof proof, File file, boolean saveProofSteps)
      Create a new proof saver.
      Parameters:
      proof - proof to save
      file - file to save proof into
      saveProofSteps - whether to save proof steps (false -> only proof obligation)

    • ProofSaver

      public ProofSaver(Proof proof, File file, String internalVersion, boolean saveProofSteps)
      Create a new proof saver.
      Parameters:
      proof - proof to save
      file - file to save proof into
      internalVersion - version of KeY to add to the proof log
      saveProofSteps - whether to save proof steps (false -> only proof obligation)

  • Method Details

    • saveToFile

      public static void saveToFile(File file, Proof proof) throws IOException
      Save this proof to a file
      Parameters:
      file - file to save proof in
      proof - the Proof to be saved
      Throws:
      IOException - on any I/O error

    • saveProofObligationToFile

      public static void saveProofObligationToFile(File file, Proof proof) throws IOException
      Save this proof to a file whilst omitting all proof steps. In effect, this only saves the proof obligation.
      Parameters:
      file - file to save proof in
      proof - the Proof to be saved
      Throws:
      IOException - on any I/O error

    • save

      protected void save(File file) throws IOException
      Save the proof to file referenced by file. The format in which the proof is stored depends on the class. Thr base class creates a plain output file. Subclasses may choose to use other formats.
      Parameters:
      file - the file to write to
      Throws:
      IOException - if I/O fails

    • save

      public String save()

    • getBasePath

      protected String getBasePath() throws IOException
      Overrides:
      getBasePath in class OutputStreamProofSaver
      Throws:
      IOException

    • computeBasePath

      public static String computeBasePath(File proofFile) throws IOException
      Computes the base path of the given proof File.

      This method is used by getBasePath() and by the Eclipse integration.

      Parameters:
      proofFile - The proof File.
      Returns:
      The computed base path of the given proof File.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • addProofSaverListener

      public static void addProofSaverListener(ProofSaverListener l)
      Adds the ProofSaverListener.
      Parameters:
      l - The ProofSaverListener to add.

    • removeProofSaverListener

      public static void removeProofSaverListener(ProofSaverListener l)
      Removes the ProofSaverListener.
      Parameters:
      l - The ProofSaverListener to remove.

    • fireProofSaved

      protected static void fireProofSaved(ProofSaverEvent e)
      Informs all listener about the event ProofSaverListener.proofSaved(ProofSaverEvent).
      Parameters:
      e - The event.
